## What subject or chapter does this concern?

<!-- e.g. Suites, Dérivation, the daily mission cockpit, the onboarding flow... -->

## What would you like to happen?

<!-- Describe the feature clearly. What should the student see or be able to do? -->

## Why does this help students?

<!-- What problem does it solve? What does a student gain from this? -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Did you think of other ways to solve this? What did you rule out and why? -->

## Any extra context?

<!-- Screenshots, references, similar features in other tools - anything that helps. -->
